name: Defrag
description: 在所有策略执行完毕后，将后排无特殊约束的学生前移到前排空位，使座位结果趋近前排。不限同列。注意：此策略可能导致前序策略（同桌分组、同桌不重复等）的安排结果失效。最优方案是使会场座位数与人数相近/匹配以规避碎片化。
author: A_Pair Team

Defrag_NoGaps.zh-CN: 所有空座后方无可移动的学生，碎片整理已跳过
Defrag_NoGaps.en-US: No gaps with students behind them, defragmentation skipped

Defrag_NoEligible.zh-CN: 所有后排学生均受约束（固定座位或同桌组），碎片整理已跳过
Defrag_NoEligible.en-US: All back-row students are constrained (fixed seats or desk-mate groups), defragmentation skipped

Defrag_Moved.zh-CN: 碎片整理完成：已将 {0} 名学生前移至前排空位
Defrag_Moved.en-US: Defragmentation complete: {0} students moved forward to fill front gaps

Defrag_EffectivenessNote.zh-CN: 碎片整理可能导致前序策略（同桌分组、同桌不重复等）的安排结果失效。建议使会场座位数与人数相近/匹配以减少碎片化。
Defrag_EffectivenessNote.en-US: Defragmentation may invalidate prior strategy results (desk-mate grouping, no-repeat desk-mate). Consider matching venue capacity to student count to minimize fragmentation.
